name: Hardy Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 2 cups of hot water over the oatmeal and set aside.
2. Mix 2 tablespoons of brown sugar into the 2/3 cup of warm water, then add the yeast to proof. Let it foam and froth to about twice its original volume.
3. Combine the yeast mixture with the oatmeal.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: flour, butter, more yeast, salt, and the rest of the hot water.
5. Knead the dough well until smooth.
6. Allow the dough to rise until doubled in size.
7. Punch down the dough into loaves and let it rise again.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes. Makes 2-3 loaves.
